label: Fisioterapista

beats.name: HOOK
beats.video_prompt: Italian physiotherapy clinic. Treatment bed with patient lying down, ready. Physiotherapist enters with paper file. Flips through pages, searching. 'Where were we? Fourth session? Fifth?' Patient unsure. File has handwritten pages, a paperclip holding three different sheets together, one illegible note on the margin. Soft clinical light, intimate documentary feel, slow push-in on confused face, cinematic 4K, 9:16 vertical

beats.name: PROBLEM
beats.video_prompt: Close-up of handwritten patient chart: 'VAS: 7/10 arrow 4/10 arrow ?' — then nothing. Patient didn't come. The progression stopped. Empty line. Then: empty treatment bed, clock ticking. Documentary close-up, clinical light, shallow DOF, cinematic 4K, 9:16 vertical

voiceover.text: In Italia ci sono sessantotto mila fisioterapisti. Un ciclo standard e dieci sedute. Se il paziente salta la quinta senza avviso, perdi cinquanta euro. Ma soprattutto perdi il punto del ciclo. Alla sesta non sai piu da dove ripartire.

beats.name: AGITATION
beats.video_prompt: Empty physiotherapy treatment bed, exercise bands hanging unused, clinical silence. Patient chart open on desk with blank progression line. Still camera, cold clinical light, uncomfortable pause, cinematic 4K, 9:16 vertical

beats.name: SOLUTION
beats.video_prompt: Same physiotherapist opens tablet before entering treatment room. Screen shows: 'Bianchi Roberto — 6th session. VAS initial: 7. VAS session 5: 3. Progression: excellent. Next goal: return to running.' He enters the room confident. Patient sees him enter sure of himself. Trust. Warm clinical light, professional but human, smooth tracking, cinematic 4K, 9:16 vertical

voiceover.text: Con FLUXION, la scheda paziente traccia ogni seduta. VAS, esercizi, note cliniche. Leggibili, sicure, sul tuo computer. Il promemoria parte da solo: il paziente non dimentica. Il ciclo va a termine. Zero abbonamenti. Zero commissioni.
FLUXION. Quattrocentonovantasette euro. Una volta. Per sempre.

lines.text: Il gestionale che non ti costa ogni mese

video_gen_config.negative_prompt: text overlay, watermarks, logos, brand names, blurry, distorted faces, low quality, overexposed, artifacts, generic stock footage, CGI, artificial
video_gen_config.style_prefix: Cinematic 4K, clinical professional, authentic Italian physiotherapy practice, warm documentary

music_gen_config.genre_hint: calm clinical, soft strings with piano, professional trust

prompts.tense: clinical concern, soft cello low notes, sparse piano, empathetic unease, minor key, 70bpm, no vocals
prompts.uplifting: clinical resolution, warm strings melody, gentle piano, professional trust, hope of healing, major key, 95bpm, no vocals

wa_message:
Ciao [nome], un ciclo di dieci sedute interrotto alla quinta e un paziente che non guarisce e non torna.
Questo traccia tutto e manda i promemoria. [VIDEO]
